GPT Image 2 Prompt：手绘风格的《{城市名}旅行手账插画》

---

提示词： https://t.co/vIe0yJqOmH

GPT-ImageGen-2 did this in one shot, with just the prompt "turn all of Tennyson's Ulysses into a comic, across as many pages as needed. make it great, include the full text"

10 pages, though it did use what seems to be the ImageGen-2 's preferred "spackled drawing" style 1/ https://t.co/Fg2qLlA0vj

Continued...

Impressive character consistency. https://t.co/4cTrBEpqix

Final 2 panels.

".Come, my friends,
'Tis not too late to seek a newer world." https://t.co/gD46ujBxlN
Someone wanted Joyce's Ulysses instead https://t.co/7NKfSqZpV1

Also agree with this. AI's ability to do consistent pacing is a problem. Here, the poem anchors enough of the comic that it is okay, but static, though with a few good moments. But fiction writing and good pacing remain challenging: https://t.co/1mdXeWwpdB

So many people are sending me their Codex workflows. This is wild. Here’s the YouTube video.
https://t.co/FhgfwRMSkL

Aaron is right (as usual) and I've been saying this for a year.

Large companies know they can benefit from AI but have 0 ability to do it themselves.

Their options are either traditional consulting shops like McKinsey and Deloitte, which suck ass (respectfully), or agentic SaaS

Google 宣布推出下一代Deep Research并开放API 

两档模型：

Deep Research： 面向速度，降低延迟和成本，适用于需要快速高质量答案的交互式界面。

Deep Research Max： 面向深度分析，需要更多时间进行思考、推理和搜索，可生成包含原生信息图表的完整研究报告。

价格：$1 ，一份快报、$7 https://t.co/lQiwQiqaOM
Google 自己公布的 benchmark 显示，Deep Research Max 在检索和推理能力的跨行业标准测试上相比上一代有明显跃升： https://t.co/ejVRmjB1zY
跟去年 12 月那版对比，Max 在 Google 自己的专家评测里胜率也有大幅提升： https://t.co/9OGrfNRJIM

MCP 是这次最大的变化

之前 Deep Research 只能从开放网络搜，这次加了 MCP（Model Context Protocol）支持，意味着研究过程里可以挂任意远程数据源。 https://t.co/YG4XXIrmAG

原生画图是第二个大变化

以前 Deep Research 只出文字报告，现在能直接出图表和信息图。

两种路径：

一种是让 agent 自己写 HTML 渲染交互式图表

另一种是调 Nano Banana 2 生成高质感的信息图

Google 官方给了 4 张 Max 生成的真实案例，都是那种本来要设计师手工做、现在 agent https://t.co/uatDEWhFzE
详细介绍：https://t.co/hV5abhmEfA

https://t.co/q09sMEa5RO

弄了个高桥流skill，赶场分享时，五分钟可以掏出一个PPT来。
“一句话直出 x”，意味着稀缺性不再是 x。
